race.comment: Tough finish to the day. LOVELYCUT (4) is going well without winning, perhaps too firm at Flemington two back but back to something like her best last time. Draw hurts but she'll be hard to hold out. Forgiving the run of FROM A DISTANCE (11) first up when well supported at Warrnambool. 1100m on heavy ground was too tough, and it wouldn't surprise to see her go to the next level now in this more suitable race. DIDN'T MISS MANY (1) continues to race very well and is impossible to knock, a must for the quaddie and an each way hope. THEBELMONTGANGSTER (14) had his chance last time and is wearing a bit thin but he was good and is in the mix.
